title: selaginella novae-guineae
intro: Selaginella novae-guineae, also known as spikemoss or resurrection fern, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella novae-guineae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from rheumatism and arthritis. In traditional medicine, Selaginella novae-guineae can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
